title: Ganz MFAV - MTR/NTE RP
description: This resource pack is an add-on for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod with NTE mod. It adds the Ganz MFAV train in the game. (⚠ Not affiliated with any real brand displayed in the pack)
body:
The Ganz MFAV is a type of metro car which was manufactured by Hungarian companies Ganz-MÁVAG Mozdony-, Vagon- és Gépgyár ("Ganz-MÁVAG Locomotive, Carriage and Machine Factory") and Ganz Villamossági Gyár ("Ganz Electric Factory").

The cars were manufactured in Budapest between 1971 and 1973 and in 1987, and including the two prototype cars, in overall 23 units were made.

The series carries the distinction of being an early example of fully low-floor urban rail vehicles.

**The train is adapted to work in slab platforms!**

You're **allowed** to modify it, use it in modpack or in servers.
